zones.name: Bell Tower
zones.description: A narrow stone spire, winding stairs leading up to a swinging bronze bell.

zones.name: Fish Market
zones.description: Stalls, slippery cobbles, shouting vendors, and the always-watching cats.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Fishwives and customers packed shoulder to shoulder.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Wet fish guts on stone. Dex save at speed.

zones.name: Counting House
zones.description: Iron-banded doors, watchful guards, and the quiet of money being counted.

zones.name: Public Baths
zones.description: Steam, nudity, slick tile underfoot. A place where everyone is distracted.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Tile and soap. Athletic moves risk a fall.

zones.name: Refuse Alley
zones.description: Broken crates, rats, and the smell of yesterday. A place to vanish.

zones.name: Temple Steps
zones.description: Wide, exposed, witnessed by gods and priests. Bad place to draw a weapon.

zones.name: Ferryman's Dock
zones.description: Waiting boats, a way across, a way out. The ferryman takes coin, not questions.

zones.name: Printer's Shop
zones.description: Inks, paper, a press that can crush a hand. The owner is paid to remember faces.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Tight aisles of heavy machinery. Athletics or Dex to cross fast.

zones.name: Gallows Square
zones.description: Empty scaffold, a crowd that remembers the last hanging and is hungry for more.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Onlookers and hawkers; cover is easy, speed is not.

zones.name: Palace Gate
zones.description: High walls, polished halberds, and the patience of men paid to watch.

defaultPills.label: Closed
defaultPills.detail: Barred to anyone without papers or a fight in them.

zones.name: Grain Market
zones.description: Sacks piled head-high, chaff in the air, brokers haggling over weights.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Porters and buyers. Every step finds an elbow.

zones.name: Flower Market
zones.description: Petals underfoot, perfumed air, girls calling out prices by the bunch.

zones.name: Night Market
zones.description: Lantern-lit stalls, smoke, voices muffled by the dark. Things sold that won't be seen by day.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Shadows between the lanterns. Hiding is easy, seeing is not.

zones.name: Silk Market
zones.description: Bolts of cloth hung like curtains, muffling sound and sight. Cover at every turn.

zones.name: Cattle Pen
zones.description: Lowing beasts, churned mud, a drover's whip cracking over broad backs.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A press of livestock. Athletics to push through, or get trampled.

zones.name: Lower Wharf
zones.description: Creaking pilings, nets hung to dry, longshoremen with arms thick as hawsers.

zones.name: Customs Shed
zones.description: Crates stacked to the rafters, an inspector with a ledger and a pry bar.

zones.name: Smugglers' Stair
zones.description: Stone steps into the water, greened with weed. Boats come and go at odd hours.

zones.name: Wayshrine
zones.description: A roadside niche, a candle, an offering of bread. Peasants cross themselves passing.

zones.name: High Temple
zones.description: Bronze doors, incense smoke, a priest's voice carrying over the kneeling.

zones.name: Beggars' Shrine
zones.description: A defaced saint, a tin cup, a dozen hands reaching. No guards come here.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Hands on your sleeves, voices in your ears.

zones.name: Sailors' Tavern
zones.description: Low beams, thicker accents, a fight always one word away.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Elbow-to-elbow drinkers. Every step jostles a stranger.

zones.name: Respectable Inn
zones.description: Clean linen, honest prices, a common room where people pretend not to listen.

zones.name: Tailor's Shop
zones.description: Bolts of wool, a dressmaker's dummy, pins in everything if you fall wrong.

zones.name: Apothecary
zones.description: Glass jars, dried things hanging from the rafters, a proprietor who asks too many questions.

zones.name: Cartographer's Stall
zones.description: Rolled charts, a brass compass on a chain, a man who knows where the walls are thin.

zones.name: Butcher's Block
zones.description: Carcasses on hooks, stained sawdust, a cleaver that could part a collarbone.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Blood and fat on the floor. Run and fall.

zones.name: Farrier's Yard
zones.description: Sparks, tied horses, the ring of hammer on iron. Hot metal, nervous hooves.

defaultPills.label: On Fire
defaultPills.detail: Forge coals and a glowing shoe in tongs. Brush past, take a burn.

zones.name: Guild Hall
zones.description: Carved arms over the door, a table of magistrates, and the quiet of laws being made.

zones.name: City Jail
zones.description: A squat stone block with barred windows, straw and worse on the floors.

defaultPills.label: Closed
defaultPills.detail: Every door is locked and guards know the faces.

zones.name: Watch Post
zones.description: A brazier, a bench, two tired men with polearms leaning on the wall.

zones.name: Curtain Wall
zones.description: Great blocks of mortared stone, arrow slits, a walkway lit by lanterns at dusk.

zones.name: Tile Rooftops
zones.description: Sloped clay and narrow gaps between eaves. A fall from here would hurt.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Loose tiles, bad footing. Acrobatics to move fast.

zones.name: Stone Bridge
zones.description: Three arches over brown water, beggars against the parapets, a toll at the far end.

zones.name: Rope Bridge
zones.description: Strung between tenements high over an alley. It holds — most days.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Swaying planks. Balance to cross quickly.

zones.name: Merchant Plaza
zones.description: Open flagstones, a central fountain, awnings fluttering with every gust.

zones.name: Tanners' Row
zones.description: Vats of stinking lime, hides on frames, a smell that gets in clothes and stays.

zones.name: Smiths' Lane
zones.description: Hammer-song from a dozen forges, the heat palpable at a distance.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: Every voice is swallowed by the hammers.

zones.name: Dyers' Court
zones.description: Steaming tubs of red and indigo, hands stained to the elbow, runoff in the gutters.

zones.name: Slum Warren
zones.description: Leaning timbers, children underfoot, doorways you wouldn't put your head through.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Junk in the alleys, washing strung low. Acrobatics to run clean.

zones.name: Noble Terrace
zones.description: Manicured hedges, a wrought-iron fence, a footman already reaching for a whistle.

zones.name: Watchtower
zones.description: A stone finger above the rooftops, lantern burning all night, eyes behind the shutter.

zones.name: Cemetery
zones.description: Old stones leaning, a gravedigger whistling, fresh earth somewhere upwind.

zones.name: Public Stables
zones.description: Straw, warm animal stink, horses that know a stranger's voice when they hear one.

zones.name: Beggars' Hollow
zones.description: A ruin under the bridge, rags for roofs, a dozen watching eyes.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Bodies packed in the dry spots. Any loud move wakes the lot.

zones.name: Festival Ground
zones.description: Trestle tables, bunting, a bonfire lit by dusk. The whole quarter is here.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Revelers too drunk to move out of the way.

zones.name: Toll Gate
zones.description: A chain across the road, a man with a cudgel and a ledger, a price for every passing.

zones.name: Gambling Den
zones.description: Smoke, dice, hard looks at newcomers. Winners are watched out to the street.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Too many bodies around every table. Weaving through is slow.

zones.name: Brothel Parlour
zones.description: Red lanterns, soft cushions, a madam who keeps a pistol beneath the cashbox.

zones.name: Old Quarter
zones.description: Sagging timber, streets that don't match any map, locals who don't speak to outsiders.

zones.name: Wolf's Crossing
zones.description: A narrow game trail threading between pines. Fresh tracks in the dust.

zones.name: Ancient Oak
zones.description: A lone oak ringed with standing stones, older than any map of this country.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Whispers in the leaves that aren't the wind.

zones.name: Salt Flats
zones.description: No cover, heat shimmer, tracks that last for days. Every move is visible.

zones.name: Muddy Bog
zones.description: The suck of mud, the stink of stagnant water, deeper pools hidden beneath.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Every step risks sinking to the knee. Strength to push on.

zones.name: Cairn
zones.description: Old stones piled over old bones. The silence here is too deliberate.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Something is watching from under the stones.

zones.name: Stag's Meadow
zones.description: Open ground under open sky. A herd of deer stand quiet, watching.

zones.name: Poisoned Spring
zones.description: Clear water, wrong taste, wrong color. The birds do not drink here.

defaultPills.label: On Fire
defaultPills.detail: Some poisons burn. Passing close, make a Con save.

zones.name: Burned Grove
zones.description: Charred trunks, no leaves, no birds. Ash rises at every footfall.

zones.name: Hunter's Blind
zones.description: Abandoned platform in a tall pine. Good sightlines, easier said than reached.

zones.name: Riverbend
zones.description: Slow brown water and a row of skiffs pulled up on the bank. Someone owns them.

zones.name: Pine Ridge
zones.description: Needled slope, brown and hushed. The wind up here carries every sound.

zones.name: Oak Wood
zones.description: Thick, broad trunks and leaf-litter that crunches at every step.

zones.name: Birch Stand
zones.description: White trunks close-set and no brush between. Cover and sightlines both.

zones.name: Black Wood
zones.description: A dense thicket the sun never quite enters. Locals go around, not through.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Twilight under the canopy even at noon.

zones.name: Open Heath
zones.description: Knee-high gorse, a single hawk overhead, ground that hides foxholes.

zones.name: Summer Meadow
zones.description: Long grass, wildflowers, bees thick enough to hear. Cover to the waist.

zones.name: Cold Stream
zones.description: Shin-deep, fast, stones slick with moss. Breaks scent, slows legs.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Mossy stones. Dashing risks a spill.

zones.name: River Rapids
zones.description: White water over black rock, a roar that drowns shouting. Swim or don't.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Athletics to cross, or be carried downstream.

zones.name: Stone Ford
zones.description: An old crossing marked by boulders above the waterline. Horses hesitate here.

zones.name: Rocky Outcrop
zones.description: A shelf of weather-broken stone over the tree line. Cover at the top, a climb to reach it.

zones.name: Reed Marsh
zones.description: Tall reeds, shallow water, every step a splash. Good hiding, bad running.

zones.name: Peat Bog
zones.description: Brown water, tussocks of grass, the suggestion of something buried beneath.

zones.name: Dry Wash
zones.description: A dead riverbed of sunbaked stones. The sides offer no cover, but the going is flat.

zones.name: Sand Dunes
zones.description: Wind-sculpted ridges that shift underfoot. Every stride loses half its distance.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Loose sand. Dashing burns breath faster than distance.

zones.name: Snowfield
zones.description: Unbroken white to the horizon. Every footprint is a signed confession.

zones.name: Mountain Pass
zones.description: A cut between two shoulders of stone, the wind funneled and mean.

zones.name: Scree Slope
zones.description: Loose rock at the angle of repose. Noise carries. Footing betrays.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Scree. Dex save on a dash or fall prone.

zones.name: Ruined Tower
zones.description: A stump of masonry in the heather, half a staircase still standing.

zones.name: Hermit's Hollow
zones.description: A scooped bank under a tree, ashes in a ring, the owner gone or hiding.

zones.name: Old Battleground
zones.description: Rust in the grass, bones under the thistle, crows that won't quite leave.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Something in the grass still wants blood.

zones.name: Frozen Pond
zones.description: Black ice creaking, reeds locked upright, no way to tell how thick it holds.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Ice groans underfoot. Weight and speed both test it.

zones.name: Crow Field
zones.description: A fallow meadow dark with wings. They rise when anything approaches, loud enough to wake the dead.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: A thousand wings. Stealth is done the moment you enter.

zones.name: Standing Stones
zones.description: A ring of gray teeth against the sky. The grass inside the ring grows in a different color.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The air presses closer within the ring.

zones.name: Old Cairn
zones.description: Stones heaped man-high at a crossroads, bleached and sunken. Travelers leave coppers.

zones.name: Forgotten Path
zones.description: A trace of trodden moss, barely there, disappearing into the trees.

zones.name: Old Road
zones.description: Flagstones half-swallowed by turf. It went somewhere once. It still does.

zones.name: Wooden Bridge
zones.description: Planks over a cut, a rail half-rotten. It holds a horse. Probably.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Rotten planks. Dash and a board might give.

zones.name: Druid Circle
zones.description: Nine oaks grown in a perfect ring. Nothing builds its nest here.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The silence under the branches is listening back.

zones.name: Struck Tree
zones.description: An oak split by lightning, black to the root. The ground around is still warm.

zones.name: Carrion Field
zones.description: A deer, or what the wolves left. Flies in a cloud, the smell warning you ahead of sight.

zones.name: Falls
zones.description: White water plunges into a shaded pool. Spray carries mist to the cliffs.

zones.name: Still Lake
zones.description: Flat as pressed iron, mirroring sky and pines. A single loon cries at dusk.

zones.name: Wild Orchard
zones.description: Rows of apple trees gone to rot and thorn. The ground is soft with dropped fruit.

zones.name: Bee Glade
zones.description: Sunlit clearing full of hives on stumps. The keeper is gone and the bees know it.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: The hum swallows quiet voices.

zones.name: Bramble Thicket
zones.description: A wall of thorn higher than a man, dense enough to stop a horse.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Thorns snag armor and skin. Slow, or bleed for speed.

zones.name: Wolf Den
zones.description: A scored cleft under a boulder, bones scattered outside, a smell like a kennel.

zones.name: Crow Tree
zones.description: A lightning-stripped elm hung with nests. Every branch holds black eyes.

zones.name: Bandit Tollpost
zones.description: A log thrown across the road, a fire, three hard men with fewer questions than demands.

zones.name: Abandoned Shrine
zones.description: A stone saint face-down in moss, offerings long scavenged, silence in a shape.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Someone still leaves fresh offerings, and no one admits to it.

zones.name: Black Pool
zones.description: Still water under overhanging pines, its bottom lost to sight and rumor.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Something in the reflection doesn't match what's above.

zones.name: Dumbwaiter
zones.description: A narrow shaft and slow ropes. The servants' way between floors.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Tight squeeze. Acrobatics to pass through without dropping.

zones.name: Wine Cellar
zones.description: Arched vaults, cobwebbed bottles, a back tunnel no one will admit knowing about.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: No torches lit. Sight checks disadvantaged.

zones.name: Chapel
zones.description: Wooden pews, stained glass, a back door for things said in confession.

zones.name: Conservatory
zones.description: Glass walls and potted wonders. Fragile under any sudden violence.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Glass everywhere. Any dashed move risks breaking it and drawing guards.

zones.name: Armory
zones.description: Racks of polished steel, maintained, accounted for. Missing pieces get noticed.

zones.name: Solar
zones.description: Private rooms, personal effects, things not meant to be seen by strangers.

zones.name: Guard Room
zones.description: Off-duty soldiers, dice on a table, a fire that never quite goes out.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Armed men with nothing to do but notice newcomers.

zones.name: Kennels
zones.description: Dogs. Their masters. The dogs' memory of every stranger they've ever smelled.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: Dogs bark at anything. Stealth is over the moment you step in.

zones.name: Nursery
zones.description: Small beds, a watching governess, toys scattered across the floor.

zones.name: Secret Passage
zones.description: A wall that opens if you know where to push. The mouse-hole the house forgot.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Only those who know it exists can find the catch.

zones.name: Grand Hall
zones.description: High ceilings, marble floors, echoing footsteps. Tables and guests in the way.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Guests and servants everywhere. Stealth is nearly impossible.

zones.name: Kitchen
zones.description: Fires, knives, running servants. A back door opens onto the yard.

defaultPills.label: On Fire
defaultPills.detail: Open hearths and hot steel. Brushing past costs a Dex save.

zones.name: Scullery
zones.description: Greasy water, clattering pans, red-armed scullions who don't look up for nobles.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Water and fat on the flags. Running will put you down.

zones.name: Pantry
zones.description: Shelves of preserves, hanging game, a padlocked spice chest. Narrow passage down the middle.

zones.name: Cold Larder
zones.description: Slab floors, hanging hams, breath clouding in the lamplight.

zones.name: Library
zones.description: Towering shelves, ladders, a maze of reading nooks. Quiet, but tight quarters.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Ladders and stacks. Athletics to move through at speed.

zones.name: Master Bedchamber
zones.description: A great curtained bed, a dying fire, secrets in every drawer.

zones.name: Servants' Quarters
zones.description: Cot beds in a row, a single candle, the people who know every hidden door.

zones.name: Household Shrine
zones.description: A small altar under a gilt triptych, daily offerings of flowers and bread.

zones.name: Indoor Stable
zones.description: A colonnade of stalls inside the keep, warm animal breath and oiled tack.

zones.name: Storeroom
zones.description: Crates stacked to the rafters, labels in a fading hand, tools hung on pegs.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Stacked crates and clutter. Acrobatics to cross fast.

zones.name: Workshop
zones.description: A bench of tools, shavings underfoot, something half-built clamped in a vise.

zones.name: Audience Chamber
zones.description: A dais, two flanking guards, a petitioner kneeling on cold marble.

zones.name: Spiral Stair
zones.description: Tight stone steps curling up and down, one person wide at the pinch.

zones.name: Grand Staircase
zones.description: Wide, carpeted, railed in polished walnut. Every step seen by the portraits above.

zones.name: Servant Corridor
zones.description: Narrow, poorly lit, smelling of ash and laundry soap. Fewer witnesses.

zones.name: Long Gallery
zones.description: A corridor of portraits watching from both walls, a runner deadening footsteps.

zones.name: Narrow Passage
zones.description: Stone walls an arm's length apart, one candle guttering at the far end.

zones.name: Dining Hall
zones.description: A long table set for forty, silver polished, a feast half-eaten.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Diners and servants both. Running through costs breakage and attention.

zones.name: Sickroom
zones.description: A shuttered window, a smell of camphor, a patient who breathes like paper tearing.

zones.name: Infirmary
zones.description: Rows of cots, bloodied linen in a pail, a weary surgeon washing his hands.

zones.name: Bathhouse Room
zones.description: A sunken tub, scented steam, a brass bell to summon the attendants.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Wet tile underfoot. Dash and fall.

zones.name: Tower Room
zones.description: A circular chamber at the top of the keep, narrow windows, all the approaches visible.

zones.name: Attic
zones.description: Beams, dust, forgotten trunks. A gable window frames the courtyard below.

zones.name: Cell
zones.description: A stone box, a barred slot in the door, a bucket and nothing else.

defaultPills.label: Closed
defaultPills.detail: The door is locked. Every entry is a key in someone's pocket.

zones.name: Oubliette
zones.description: A grate in the floor opens onto a drop. Straw at the bottom, if you're lucky.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A vertical drop. Athletics to climb back, or don't fall in.

zones.name: Watch Gallery
zones.description: An interior balcony overlooking the hall below. Good view, poor cover.

zones.name: Enclosed Courtyard
zones.description: Open cobbles under the sky, a well at the center, every window watching.

zones.name: Trophy Room
zones.description: Mounted heads along every wall, a stuffed bear in one corner, dust on the glass eyes.

zones.name: Map Room
zones.description: A great table inlaid with a chart of the province, pins in it marking troops.

zones.name: Wardrobe
zones.description: Cedar-lined closet of gowns and cloaks. Good cover, terrible footing if someone pulls the rail down.

zones.name: Treasury
zones.description: An iron door, three locks, shelves of coin and plate behind. One guard by the lintel.

defaultPills.label: Closed
defaultPills.detail: Locked and watched. No one passes without a key or a corpse.

zones.name: Picture Gallery
zones.description: A long room of framed ancestors, their painted eyes tracking the length of it.

zones.name: Music Room
zones.description: A harpsichord under a tall window, chairs in a circle, sheets of music on the floor.

zones.name: Counting Office
zones.description: A wall of ledgers, a desk stained with ink, a clerk who recognizes forged seals.

zones.name: Ice House
zones.description: A deep-shadowed chamber packed with straw and winter-cut ice, cold fogging the breath.

zones.name: Smokehouse
zones.description: Hams and sides hung over smoldering chips. Every breath tastes of fat and oak.

zones.name: Ballroom
zones.description: A polished floor under a crystal chandelier, violins tuning, attendance expected.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Dancers and spectators in pairs. Cutting through costs eyes.

zones.name: Observatory Dome
zones.description: A brass telescope under a slitted dome, charts of the stars across the floor.

zones.name: Garret
zones.description: A low-ceilinged room under the eaves, one narrow window onto the roof.

zones.name: Sewer Tunnel
zones.description: Low brick arch, ankle-deep flow, the smell enough to double a man. Rats everywhere.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Only the grates overhead admit light.

zones.name: Narrow Sewer
zones.description: A half-pipe of brick barely tall enough to stoop through. The water runs black.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Crouched going. Athletics to keep pace without slipping.

zones.name: Great Sewer
zones.description: A brick-vaulted river underground, bridges of slick stone over moving filth.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Green slime on every edge. Every dash is a gamble.

zones.name: Cistern
zones.description: A pillared vault half-filled with still black water. A drip somewhere marks time.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: No natural light. The water swallows sound.

zones.name: Flooded Chamber
zones.description: Waist-deep water over flagstones, furniture tipped and drifting slowly in circles.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Wading slows speed by half. Strength to push fast.

zones.name: Natural Cavern
zones.description: A rough dome in living stone, lit only by whatever you brought with you.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Unlit stone. Sight checks fail without a torch.

zones.name: Crystal Chamber
zones.description: A pocket in the rock glittering with pale shards. Every breath catches a glint.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The crystals hum if you touch them. Nothing is supposed to hum.

zones.name: Underground River
zones.description: Black water rushing past a narrow ledge. A single misstep and you're gone downstream.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Wet stone, fast current. Dex save on any dash.

zones.name: Subterranean Stream
zones.description: A rill threading between boulders, its sound the only sound for some distance.

zones.name: Narrow Squeeze
zones.description: The walls close to a handspan. Packs off, breath held, scrape through.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Tight rock. Acrobatics to pass. Heavy armor takes twice as long.

zones.name: Collapsed Passage
zones.description: Beams cracked, rubble to the ceiling, a gap at the top you might crawl through.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Rubble and a bad ceiling. Every loud move risks more falling.

zones.name: Crypt
zones.description: Niches in the stone holding wrapped bones, names worn off the plaques.

zones.name: Ossuary
zones.description: Walls stacked with skulls in patterns, femurs in rows like cordwood.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The skulls are arranged facing the door. Someone did that recently.

zones.name: Catacomb
zones.description: A labyrinth of low tunnels lined with tombs, all the turnings looking alike.

zones.name: Dungeon Corridor
zones.description: Dressed stone, rusted sconces, a line of closed doors disappearing into gloom.

zones.name: Sprung Trap Room
zones.description: A spike-studded floor half-dropped, chains in the walls still humming from the last victim.

zones.name: Unsprung Trap Room
zones.description: Flagstones that look wrong, sconces mounted too high, a faint click from somewhere under the floor.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Pressure plates. Perception to spot, Acrobatics to avoid when moving fast.

zones.name: Forgotten Shrine
zones.description: An altar of old stone, a dead candle, a symbol chiseled across the face.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Something down here still answers prayers, and it isn't whoever the shrine was built for.

zones.name: Fungal Chamber
zones.description: A cavern carpeted in pale mushrooms that light faintly from within. They burst under weight.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Spores hang in the air. Loud noise makes the caps burst.

zones.name: Stalactite Forest
zones.description: Limestone teeth hanging close, stalagmites rising to meet them. A maze that scrapes.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Stone pillars everywhere. Athletics to weave through at speed.

zones.name: Deep Pool
zones.description: A black circle of water in the cavern floor. Something surfaces, occasionally.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The pool has no visible bottom. Something below knows you're above.

zones.name: Old Mine Working
zones.description: Timbered gallery, pick-marked walls, an abandoned cart slumped across the rails.

zones.name: Ore Vein
zones.description: A seam of raw metal glinting in the rock face, the dust in the air still warm from the last strike.

zones.name: Bat Roost
zones.description: A high vault pasted with droppings. Disturb it and the dark comes alive.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: Any noise rouses the roost. Thousands of wings and no hiding after.

zones.name: Old Carvings
zones.description: A wall of deep-cut figures marching around a doorway. No language anyone still speaks.

zones.name: Pit
zones.description: A dark hole in the floor, bottom unseen, the air from it cold and slow.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A drop. Any dashed move risks falling in without care.

zones.name: Ledge
zones.description: A narrow shelf over a drop, bad rock underfoot, a drift of wind from below.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Crumbling edge. Dex save on speed or fall.

zones.name: Echo Chamber
zones.description: A round hollow of polished stone. Every whisper comes back threefold.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: Whispers carry. Stealth is wasted here.

zones.name: Air Shaft
zones.description: A ventilation pipe a body can barely fit, climbing up toward a distant square of daylight.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A vertical squeeze. Athletics to climb fast without getting stuck.

zones.name: Root Chamber
zones.description: A cavern strung with pale tree roots like cables. They move, a little, when you aren't watching.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Something is alive in the roots that isn't the tree.

zones.name: Worm Tunnel
zones.description: A bore through the stone too round to be natural, lined with dried slime.

zones.name: Smugglers' Cache
zones.description: Crates stacked in a side passage, a cold fire ring, a ledger in a tin.

zones.name: Drowned Stairs
zones.description: Stone steps descending into standing water. The bottom step is not the bottom.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Algae on submerged stone. Running goes wrong fast.

zones.name: Nightsoil Pit
zones.description: A brick-lined shaft from the street above, thick with the city's refuse.

zones.name: Brick Vault
zones.description: A round-roofed room lined in old red brick, a storeroom for whatever shouldn't be found.

zones.name: Arched Vault
zones.description: Gothic ribs overhead, a cold floor, acoustics that carry a dropped pin.

zones.name: Ancient Foundation
zones.description: Walls of cyclopean stone under the newer city, courses older than anyone admits.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The stones weren't cut by any tool still in use.

zones.name: Chasm
zones.description: A crack across the floor of the world, wind rising from it warm, then cold.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A leap or a ledge. Athletics or go around the long way.

zones.name: Rope Bridge
zones.description: Frayed hemp strung over a deep pool, planks missing here and there.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Rotten bridge. Dashing risks a plank giving out.

zones.name: Hermit Cave
zones.description: A cleft in the rock with a straw pallet, a cold hearth, and walls scored with tally marks.

zones.name: Root Cellar
zones.description: A dug-out room under a house, shelves of jars, potatoes going soft in baskets.

zones.name: Lich Tomb
zones.description: A single sealed sarcophagus under a vaulted ceiling. The air is colder than it should be.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Frost crawls along the stone when you speak.

zones.name: Salt Mine
zones.description: White walls glittering in lamplight, crunching salt underfoot, air dry enough to crack lips.

zones.name: Glowing Moss Gallery
zones.description: A passage washed in pale green light from moss thick as fur on the walls.

zones.name: Lava Crack
zones.description: A fissure in the rock lit from beneath by slow red fire. The air wavers.

defaultPills.label: On Fire
defaultPills.detail: Heat rising from the crack. Lingering costs Con saves.

zones.name: Subterranean Plaza
zones.description: A broad flagged space below the city, pillars of worked stone in ranks, nothing moving.

zones.name: Kobold Warren
zones.description: A nest of crawlspaces, low ceilings, every wall smelling faintly of smoke and lizard.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Hand-dug tunnels scaled small. Humans crawl or stoop.

zones.name: Cavern Lake
zones.description: A sheet of black water under the stone sky, not a ripple, not a sound.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The surface doesn't reflect the ceiling overhead.

zones.name: Deep Shaft
zones.description: A vertical pit with iron rungs corroded to flakes. The bottom swallows lanternlight.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Bad rungs. Athletics to climb fast. Slips hurt.

zones.name: Cult Chamber
zones.description: A circle chalked on the floor, black candles in a ring, something still warm in the brazier.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The circle is open, and nothing in the stories says that's good.

zones.name: Street Grate
zones.description: Iron bars in the cobbles, the reek rising through them. A lever sets them free.

zones.name: Cellar Hatch
zones.description: A wooden trapdoor set in an alley floor, padlocked but not always. Steps go down into dark.

zones.name: Open Manhole
zones.description: A round shaft in the street with a ladder bolted to one side. Someone left the cover off.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A hole in the road. Dex save on a dash or drop in.

zones.name: Old Well
zones.description: A stone cylinder in the square with a rope and bucket. The well is deeper than it serves.

zones.name: Cave Mouth
zones.description: A dark gap at the base of a hillside, cold air coming out. Something scraped the lip smooth.

zones.name: Mine Entrance
zones.description: A timbered adit in the rock face, rails leading in, a wheeled cart derailed outside.

zones.name: Badger Sett
zones.description: A hole in a bank, wider than a badger needs. Something bigger has been using it.

zones.name: Marked Pit
zones.description: A ring of cairn-stones around an opening in the ground. A warning, or a door.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The stones were set to keep something inside. Or outside.

zones.name: Cellar Stairs
zones.description: A narrow flight of stone steps behind a warped door, lanternlight fading as you go down.

zones.name: Crypt Entrance
zones.description: A flagstone prised up in the chapel floor, a coughed draft, steps cut in the bedrock.

zones.name: Cellar Trapdoor
zones.description: A ring pull in the pantry floor, greased hinges, a ladder that goes further than expected.

zones.name: Ice-house Shaft
zones.description: A stone-lined drop from the yard into a buried chamber, the air cold enough to sting.

zones.name: City Gate
zones.description: Great oak leaves bound in iron, a portcullis half-raised, the fields visible beyond.

zones.name: Riverside Commons
zones.description: Trampled grass where the town meets the water, washerwomen and cattle sharing the bank.

zones.name: Wall Breach
zones.description: A collapse in the old curtain, rubble sloped to the outside, grass coming up through the cracks.

zones.name: Outer Orchard
zones.description: Fruit trees in rows just beyond the walls, town bells audible, brambles encroaching from the wood.

zones.name: Back Door
zones.description: A plain plank door from a kitchen out onto the alley, ajar for air.

zones.name: Service Entrance
zones.description: A covered passage between the street and the household yard, carts rumbling through both ways.

zones.name: Inn Back Door
zones.description: A stable-yard door from the common room, hinges loud, the cook's eyes sharp.

zones.name: Hermit Hut
zones.description: A thatched shack in a forest clearing, a herb-rack by the door, smoke from a single chimney.

zones.name: Shepherd's Bothy
zones.description: A drystone hut with a turf roof on the high moor, a fire pit, a pallet under the window.

zones.name: Wayside Shrine
zones.description: A small stone chamber at the crossroads, a carved saint inside, a shelf for offerings.

zones.name: Hunting Lodge
zones.description: A timber hall in the deep wood, antlers over the door, shutters closed to the wind.

zones.name: Mushroom Ring
zones.description: A perfect circle of pale caps in the moss. The grass inside grows in a slightly different green.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Step inside and the wood outside the ring goes quiet.

zones.name: Singing Glade
zones.description: Wildflowers in colors that have no name, and a song that seems to come from the petals themselves.

zones.name: Glasswing Meadow
zones.description: Butterflies the size of hands, wings like stained windows, drifting in slow lazy circles.

zones.name: Hollow Oak
zones.description: An ancient tree with a door-shaped split in its trunk. The hollow is bigger inside than out.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Distance bends inside the trunk. A few steps may be many.

zones.name: Twilight Revel
zones.description: Lanterns hung in the air without strings, dancers turning to music no instrument is playing. They notice newcomers.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Whirling dancers; refusing a partner gives offense.

zones.name: Throne of Briar
zones.description: A seat woven from living thorn, vines moving when no one looks. Empty, for now.

zones.name: Bargain Stone
zones.description: A flat slab worn smooth by handshakes. A name spoken here is harder to take back.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Promises made on the stone hum behind the teeth.

zones.name: Mirror Pool
zones.description: Still water that shows the wrong reflection: older, younger, or someone else entirely.

zones.name: Bridge of Song
zones.description: Slats of pale wood strung over a chasm of mist. The bridge plays a low note for every step.

zones.name: Silver Brook
zones.description: Water that runs uphill in places, clear enough to count the stones, cold enough to bruise the wrist.

zones.name: Hour Garden
zones.description: Beds of flowers that bloom and wither while you watch. A path of crushed petals winds through.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Time runs strangely; a moment here may be an hour outside.

zones.name: Honeycomb Hollow
zones.description: Walls of golden wax taller than a house, hum of unseen wings, the air thick and sweet.

zones.name: Lantern Field
zones.description: Pale flames floating just above the grass, drifting at the pace of a slow walk. They follow if asked.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The lights answer a polite request, sometimes literally.

zones.name: Antler Arch
zones.description: Two trees grown together, a crown of shed antlers caught in the boughs, sun spilling through.

zones.name: Vine Stair
zones.description: Living vines woven into steps, climbing up into the canopy. They tighten when stepped on.

zones.name: Petal Road
zones.description: A path strewn with fallen blossoms, knee-deep in places. The petals never seem to brown.

zones.name: Ashen Road
zones.description: A track of pale dust between dead fields, every footprint slow to fill in. No wind to take them.

zones.name: Bone Field
zones.description: Long grass gone gray, scattered with old white shapes. Nothing buried, nothing claimed.

zones.name: Withered Orchard
zones.description: Rows of bare black trees, fruit shriveled on the branch. The smell of cider gone to vinegar.

zones.name: Hollow Town
zones.description: Houses still standing, doors half-open, no smoke from any chimney. The streets remember footsteps.

zones.name: Broken Bell
zones.description: A cracked bronze bell on the ground beside its toppled tower. It has not rung in a long time.

zones.name: Burnt Library
zones.description: Shelves collapsed in long black drifts, a few pages still legible if read quickly.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Charred timbers and ash. Footing is uncertain at speed.

zones.name: Memorial Stones
zones.description: Tall slate markers in uneven rows, names worn smooth by no rain in particular.

zones.name: Pauper's Field
zones.description: Soft ground, no markers, only the slight rise where the trenches were filled in.

zones.name: Mourner's Walk
zones.description: A colonnade of weeping statues, hooded faces lowered. The path between them is narrow.

zones.name: Drifting Mist
zones.description: Pale fog at chest-height, things half-seen in it that may not be there at all.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Vision cuts to a few paces. Sound carries strangely.

zones.name: Soundless Hollow
zones.description: A low place where every noise dies a step in. Even breath seems to be borrowed.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Speech and shouts fall flat. Signaling at distance fails.

zones.name: Smothered Lantern
zones.description: An iron post with a cold flame inside, casting no light, only a vague gray suggestion.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: The lantern eats light rather than gives it.

zones.name: Forgotten Crossroads
zones.description: Four roads meeting in a barren place, signposts blank, no traveler in any direction.

zones.name: Abandoned Inn
zones.description: A roadside building, sign creaking on one chain, tables set for guests who never arrived.

zones.name: Ferryman's Pier
zones.description: Black water, a worn dock, a single pole-boat with no one to crew it.

zones.name: Gray Cathedral
zones.description: Vaulted ruin half-roofed, windows empty of glass, the altar swept clean by no one.

zones.name: Glow-Cap Grove
zones.description: Pale mushrooms taller than a man, casting a soft blue light. The spores drift like slow snow.

zones.name: Spore Field
zones.description: Low mats of yellow fungus that puff at every footstep, throwing up a thick sweet dust.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: Spores choke the air. Constitution save when crossing at speed.

zones.name: Shrieker Patch
zones.description: Stout violet caps that scream when anything passes near. The sound carries far in the dark.

defaultPills.label: Loud
defaultPills.detail: Shriekers wail at any movement, alerting things deeper in.

zones.name: Cathedral Cavern
zones.description: A cave so vast the ceiling is lost in gloom, stalagmites the size of towers rising from the floor.

zones.name: Crystal Vault
zones.description: Walls studded with great violet shards, each one humming faintly when touched.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: The crystals catch light and throw it sideways into the rock.

zones.name: Echo Hall
zones.description: A cavern that returns every whisper threefold, sometimes adding a word that wasn't said.

zones.name: Drow Outpost
zones.description: Carved spider-arches, lanterns of cold blue flame, watchful figures in dark mail.

zones.name: Duergar Forge
zones.description: Anvils ringing, dwarves grim and gray, the heat of the bellows pushing back the dark.

defaultPills.label: On Fire
defaultPills.detail: Open forges and slag pits. Flame everywhere.

zones.name: Fungal Market
zones.description: Booths of bone and chitin, deep gnomes haggling in low voices over jars of glowing things.

defaultPills.label: Crowded
defaultPills.detail: Tight aisles, sharp eyes, and many hands near pockets.

zones.name: Bottomless Drop
zones.description: A black slit in the cavern floor. Tossed stones never report back.

defaultPills.label: Obstacle
defaultPills.detail: A fall ends the chase. Dex save on a dash.

zones.name: Spider-Bridge
zones.description: A rope of dense webbing strung across a chasm, sticky underfoot, the strands creaking.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Web strands catch the boot. Every step is a small fight.

zones.name: Shaft Climb
zones.description: A vertical chimney of damp stone, footholds carved by something with the wrong number of fingers.

zones.name: Mind Flayer Sanctum
zones.description: A round chamber of fitted basalt, a chair of bone in the center, the air thick with something thinking.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Thoughts feel watched. Concentration tests at disadvantage.

zones.name: Beholder Eyrie
zones.description: A high domed cavern, the walls scoured smooth by old disintegration. Many small holes look out.

zones.name: Sunken Glyphs
zones.description: A floor of carved stone half-flooded, symbols still faintly aglow under the black water.

defaultPills.label: Slippery
defaultPills.detail: Wet carved stone. Athletics to charge across.

zones.name: Black Lake
zones.description: Still water that drinks the lantern light. Something larger than a boat moves in it sometimes.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: The lake swallows light; what swims under it is rarely friendly.

zones.name: Veiled Path
zones.description: A forest trail that grows brighter step by step, leaves greener than they should be, the air thickening with bell-tones.

zones.name: Faerie Hill
zones.description: A green mound under an old tree, a doorway in its side that wasn't there yesterday. Music spills from inside.

defaultPills.label: Strange
defaultPills.detail: Going in is easy. Coming out the same year is not.

zones.name: Sunken Catacomb
zones.description: A crypt corridor where the torches dim halfway down, the stone goes grayer, and the dust forgets to settle.

defaultPills.label: Dark
defaultPills.detail: Lights weaken without reason. Shadows move late.

zones.name: Threshold Tomb
zones.description: A mausoleum with two doors: the one you came in by, and another that opens onto a colder, grayer world.

zones.name: Deep Stair
zones.description: A spiral of worn steps cut into the rock, descending past natural cave into something older and far less natural.

zones.name: Slaver's Tunnel
zones.description: A long worked passage, spider-glyphs scratched into the walls, the air going colder and dryer the further in you go.
